scripts.lint: biome lint astro.config.mjs biome.json package.json tsconfig.json src/i18n src/lib src/remotion
scripts.format: biome format --write astro.config.mjs biome.json package.json tsconfig.json src/i18n src/lib src/remotion
scripts.check: biome check astro.config.mjs biome.json package.json tsconfig.json src/i18n src/lib src/remotion
scripts.validate: npm run check && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run audit
